brief_summary: Time-axis sonic schematic for the H2 'What to listen for'. Top lane shows the Oil King as two distinct sonic events ~0.25s apart: a tall narrow spike (top-out, PC voice) and a broad rounded crest with coral wash + focal dot (bottom-out, nylon voice). A dashed gap line between them is labelled '¼ second'. Bottom row shows 'most under-30¢ linears' as one fused asymmetric curve labelled 'one fused sound', for contrast.
data_sources: gateron-oil-king-deep-dive.mdx § 'What to listen for' — 'in a well-tuned linear that gap is a single fused sound, and in the Oil King it is two distinct events spaced about a quarter-second apart at typing speed. That separation is the polycarbonate top doing its job.'
